steps.t: Imák and Venko can be found two levels up from the stable-master in Skarháld, in the north-west corner.
Imák of the Stout-axes is in the north-west corner, two levels up from the stable-master in Skarháld.
Venko of the Zhélruka is in the north-west corner, two levels up from the stable-master in Skarháld.
Durin is waiting by the Skarháld stable-master to hear that Imák and Venko will go in search of the raiding-party in the Wells of Langflood.
Glóin has made it known he wishes to speak with you and Durin at the stable-master in Skarháld.
A bag of foodstuffs can be found two levels above the Skarháld stable-master. Climbing gear can be found three levels above the Skarháld stable-master…
Glóin is by the stable-master in Skarháld.
Durin is by the stable-master in Skarháld.
The way to the Wells of Langflood from the Grey Mountains is west of Skarháld, accessible by a narrow pass in the southern cliffs east of the broken R…
Glóin is at the entrance to the pass that leads to the Wells of Langflood from the Grey Mountains, east and south of the broken Rushgate.
